changes.reason: Activate exactly one dormant VALID_0DTE pin-avoid concept as an attribution split while preserving all current valid-0DTE engines. This tests whether existing playbook logic can isolate charm/pin tail states without disabling charm_pin_pullback_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long.

Enable the dormant pin-avoid profile only after adding it to the valid-0DTE router. The exposed parameter space only provides this profile enable switch, so this is intentionally a minimal routing discovery run rather than a threshold-tuning run.

recommendation.expected_effect: This should create clean attribution for a dormant charm-wall/pin-avoid regime, potentially absorbing or blocking high-MAE charm/pin entries while leaving the profitable baseline profiles intact. Success requires total net profit >=98% of run_029, trade count within 10%, protected fast-winner retention, slow_12h still zero, and either positive standalone pin-avoid PnL or improved combined charm/pin worst MAE. Main risk is router cannibalization of existing charm-pin/charm-wall winners with no MAE improvement.
recommendation.label: promote
recommendation.rationale: Run a config-only dormant router split rather than another saturated take-profit or direct 1DTE tightening experiment. The leader is flat across run_029/run_037/run_038/run_040, while charm_pin_pullback_long still owns the global -513.4 MAE and charm_wall_breakaway_long is a high-convexity but small-sample edge. The strategist plan explicitly calls for activating exactly one dormant pin-avoid concept for attribution. I am using only two changes because charm_wall_pin_avoid_long exposes only the enabled key in the legal key summary; adding extra unrelated knobs would violate the one-family rule.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long contributes $1261.5 over 34 VALID_0DTE trades but owns the global worst MAE at -513.4. charm_wall_breakaway_long contributes $985.6 from 5 trades with high convexity. The bad-MAE rows overlap protected extended-VWAP winners, so a dormant profile split is preferable to broad pruning.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Pin-Avoid Dormant Split
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The dormant profile may cannibalize profitable charm_pin_pullback_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long entries without improving worst MAE, or it may remain unreachable and produce a flat run.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm/pin context where current charm-pin pullback or charm-wall breakaway logic admits high-extension entries with pin-avoid characteristics.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Standalone charm_wall_pin_avoid_long PnL is positive or combined charm/pin worst MAE improves, while total net profit remains >=98% of run_029, completed trades stay within 10%, protected fast winners are retained, and slow_12h remains 0.
